name: J1939TestWaitForPG
title: J1939TestWaitForPG
tables: Deprecated Function Replaced by TestWaitForJ1939PG
Function Syntax
long J1939TestWaitForPG( dword sourceAddr, dword destAddr, dword pgn, dword timeout )
long J1939TestWaitForPG( dword sourceAddr, dword destAddr, dbMsg message, dword timeout )
long J1939TestWaitForPG( dbNode source, dbNode dest, dword pgn, dword timeout )
long J1939TestWaitForPG( dbNode source, dword pgn, dword timeout )
long J1939TestWaitForPG( dword sourceAddr, dword destAddr, pg pgBuffer, dword pgBufferSize, dword timeout )
Function
Wait until the specified parameter group is received.
Parameters
sourceAddr source address of the PG or Null Address (0xFE) for wildcard
destAddr destination address of the PG or Null Address (0xFE) for wildcard, ignored for broadcast PGs
pgn parameter group number (PGN) to wait for
source node from database, see node definition
dest node from database, see node definition
message message from database
pgBuffer parameter group, that is filled with the received data
pgBufferSize size of parameter group
timeout timeout in [ms] or 0 for deactivating the timeout
Return Values
-2: Resume due to constraint violation -1: General error, for example, functionality is not available 0: Resume due to timeout >0: Resume due to event occurred
Availability
Up to Version
Restricted To
Measurement Setup
Simulation/Test Setup
Example long lret;lret = J1939TestWaitForPG(10, 0xFF, 0xF123, 500 );switch(lret) { case 1: break; default: // error, timeout or constrain violation break;}
